sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_series (value Float64, time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY time;
SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedSum(5)(value, time) AS exp_smooth FROM time_series ORDER BY time;
UPDATE time_series SET value = value + 5 WHERE time = '2023-01-01 12:01:00';
SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedSum(10)(value, time) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS exp_smooth FROM time_series WHERE value > 20;
